texto: I cannot conceive of a greater loss than the loss of one's self-respect. Decedents of the beautiful women that fought so hard for centuries to be equal and not objects of men's will, only their achievement to die in vain. As today's woman single desire is to be any men's object by any means on her part. Talk about irony...
explicacao: Citação de Irena Deneva sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I cannot conceive of a greater loss than the loss of one's self-respect. Decedents of the beautif…” articula autoestima, equal, self-esteem em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como luto e self-esteem.
